message.content:
{
  "query": [
    "digitalization",
    "telecommuting",
    "workaholism",
    "job performance"
  ],
  "code_syntax": "Homeoffice und suchthaftes Arbeiten in Deutschland",
  "items": [
    {
      "title": "Mannheim Corona Study (MCS) – GIP Special Survey 2020",
      "host": "GESIS",
      "country": "Germany",
      "years": ["2020"],
      "language": ["German"],
      "keywords": ["home office", "telecommuting", "COVID-19", "digitalization", "job performance", "work–family conflict"],
      "description": "Special survey conducted via the German Internet Panel (GIP) during the COVID-19 pandemic capturing work arrangements in Germany, including adoption of home office/telework, changes in working hours, and self-reported impacts on work."
    },
    {
      "title": "GESIS Panel – Special Survey on the Coronavirus Outbreak 2020",
      "host": "GESIS",
      "country": "Germany",
      "years": ["2020"],
      "language": ["German"],
      "keywords": ["home office", "telework", "COVID-19", "work conditions", "digitalization"],
      "description": "A GESIS Panel special module focusing on the effects of the coronavirus outbreak, including items on working from home, workplace changes, and digital tools usage among adults in Germany."
    },
    {
      "title": "German Internet Panel (GIP) – Core Study (selected waves)",
      "host": "GESIS",
      "country": "Germany",
      "years": ["2013", "2020", "2021"],
      "language": ["German"],
      "keywords": ["digitalization", "work", "home office", "telecommuting", "labor market"],
      "description": "Long-running online panel of adults in Germany with thematic modules that, in selected waves, include questions on digitalization of work and (during COVID-19) the prevalence of home office and remote work."
    },
    {
      "title": "BIBB/BAuA Employment Survey 2018 (Erwerbstätigenbefragung 2018)",
      "host": "GESIS",
      "country": "Germany",
      "years": ["2018"],
      "language": ["German"],
      "keywords": ["working conditions", "home office", "mobile work", "digitalization", "performance pressure", "health at work"],
      "description": "Representative survey of employed persons in Germany collecting detailed information on working conditions, including mobile work and home office practices, digital tools, performance demands, and health-related outcomes."
    },
    {
      "title": "BIBB/BAuA Employment Survey 2012 (Erwerbstätigenbefragung 2012)",
      "host": "GESIS",
      "country": "Germany",
      "years": ["2012"],
      "language": ["German"],
      "keywords": ["working conditions", "telework", "home office", "digitalization", "work intensity"],
      "description": "Representative survey of employees in Germany covering working conditions and arrangements such as telework/home office and aspects of work intensity and digital work environments."
    },
    {
      "title": "ISSP 2015 – Work Orientations IV (Germany)",
      "host": "GESIS",
      "country": "Germany",
      "years": ["2015"],
      "language": ["German"],
      "keywords": ["work commitment", "work–life balance", "job satisfaction", "job performance (self-assessed)"],
      "description": "German module of the International Social Survey Programme’s Work Orientations series, including measures of work commitment and work–life balance that can serve as proxies related to overcommitment/workaholism and perceived job performance."
    }
  ]
}
